summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing after date-fns downgrade from 4.1.0 to 3.6.0. All date/calendar functionality verified working correctly with no runtime errors.

design_issues.component: DialogContent (Agenda, Sala de Juntas, Public Sala)
design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attribute for accessibility
design_issues.note: Accessibility warning only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Activity creation modal with date picker
Date selection using HTML5 date input (2025-08-15)
Recurrence selector - Weekly option with hint text
Sala de Juntas page calendar rendering
Monday recurring blocks display ('Reunión Dirección Comercial')
Monday blocking validation (warning message + disabled submit)
Public guest page /sala loads without authentication
Public page calendar rendering with Monday blocks
Guest reservation form with name and date inputs

additional_notes.peer_dependency_conflict: Resolved - build now succeeds on Render
additional_notes.calendar_implementation: App uses custom CalendarViews.js (no direct date-fns usage) and shadcn Calendar component (uses react-day-picker which depends on date-fns)
additional_notes.test_coverage: All date/calendar features tested including: date pickers, calendar views, date calculations, Monday detection, recurrence feature, guest reservations
additional_notes.console_warnings: Only accessibility warnings (aria-describedby) - not related to date-fns
